description_long: A small group of three stacked donuts and one donut lying on its side are placed on a dark, rectangular, wooden surface. The donuts have a classic ring shape with a golden-brown, slightly matte exterior, and appear to be plain without any visible icing or toppings. The surface beneath them is a dark, textured wood, likely a table or shelf, with a subtle checkered grain pattern. The donuts are arranged close together near one edge of the surface, with the single donut slightly separated from the stack. There are no visible packaging materials, branding, or decorative elements present. The overall scene suggests a casual, unadorned presentation, as might be found in a bakery, café, or street food stall.
description: A group of plain, golden-brown donuts sits on a dark wooden surface, with three stacked and one lying on its side. The donuts are unadorned and presented without packaging or decoration.
description_view_0: Three donuts are stacked together with a fourth donut lying on its side to the right, all on a dark wooden surface.
description_view_1: The stacked donuts and the single donut are seen from an angle, emphasizing their round shape and the wood grain of the surface.
description_view_2: The donuts are viewed from the opposite side, showing the stack and the single donut now grouped closely together on the left.
description_view_3: The donuts are seen from the end of the surface, with the stack and single donut appearing at the far edge.
